h1: Custom Power Banks & Chargers for Events and Giveaways
metaTitle: Custom Power Banks & Chargers | Perfect Imprints
metaDescription: Order custom power banks and chargers for trade shows, corporate events, and employee gifts. Fast turnaround, low MOQ. Shop now at PerfectImprints.com.
introHtml:
Keep your audience powered up and your brand top of mind with custom power banks and chargers. Whether you're equipping a sales team for a week-long trade show, sending a practical thank-you to clients, or assembling an employee onboarding kit that says you care, a portable charger is a gift that gets used daily. Marketing directors appreciate the high perceived value and long shelf life. HR directors love them for safety kits and recognition programs. Business owners see the ROI in every charge.

Our selection covers every scenario. Choose slim wireless models like The Slim Wireless Power Bank for modern offices. Hand out UL Keychain Power Banks at conferences for a compact, UL-certified safety boost. Stock the Power Play 10K Power Bank for heavy users who need a full day of backup. For a premium corporate gift, consider the Richmond Powerbank Portfolio, which combines a leather folio with a built-in charger. And the 5-in-1 Wireless Power Bank works as a charger, stand, and more for desk workers.

Every power bank can be customized with your logo using laser engraving, screen printing, or full-color pad printing. Most models offer color options to match your brand. Minimum order quantities start as low as 50 units for select items. Production lead times typically range from 10 to 15 business days. We also offer rush production and free art proofs to make ordering easy. Ready to get started? Browse the category below and request a quote.

faqs.q: What is the minimum order quantity for custom power banks?
faqs.a: Minimums vary by model. Many popular power banks like the Flash Power Bank start at 50 units. Higher-capacity or premium models like the Richmond Powerbank Portfolio may require 100+ units. Contact us for exact MOQs on specific items.

faqs.q: Can you laser engrave logos on metal power banks?
faqs.a: Yes. Laser engraving is ideal for metal and metallic-finish power banks like the Tenfour Powerbank. It creates a permanent, high-contrast mark. Screen printing and full-color pad printing are also available for plastic or rubberized surfaces.

faqs.q: How long does production and shipping take?
faqs.a: Standard production is 10 to 15 business days after art approval. Rush production can cut that to 5–7 business days. Shipping time depends on your location and carrier choice. We ship from our U.S. warehouse.

faqs.q: Are these power banks safe for air travel?
faqs.a: Most of our power banks under 100 Wh (like the PEP 4000 mAh Power Bank) are TSA-friendly for carry-on luggage. UL-certified options like the 3000 mAh UL Sequin Power Bank meet strict safety standards. Always check airline regulations for larger models.

faqs.q: Can I order samples before placing a bulk order?
faqs.a: Yes. We offer sample orders for most power banks. Samples are typically unprinted or can include a low-cost digital print. Contact our sales team to request a sample of the model you're interested in.

heroAltText: Custom power banks and chargers with engraved logos arranged on a desk, including a slim wireless model and a keychain power bank.
